metadata.name: Provide Order Status Update to Customer

description: A customer contacts support to ask for the status of their recent order.

nodes.task_description: Look up the order using the customer's name or order number.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully finds the customer's order.

nodes.task_description: Check the order's current status in the system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sees the order status is 'Shipped'.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the tracking number and provide it to the customer, along with a direct link to the carrier's tracking page.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gives the customer all the necessary information to track their package themselves.
